LOLGlob
Catalog About API GitHub

Get-Content

PowerShell discovery T1083

Read file contents. Equivalent to cat on Linux. Used to read sensitive files, credentials, and configuration data.

Binary Paths

  • PowerShell cmdlet

Glob Patterns

Pattern Wildcards Notes
& (gcm G*-C*t) C:\Windows\System32\drivers\etc\hosts * Wildcards in both verb and noun
& (gcm Get-Con*) ... * Star matches 'tent'
& (gcm G?t-Content) ... ? Single char wildcard replaces 'e'
gc C:\sensitive\file.txt Built-in alias 'gc' for Get-Content
cat C:\sensitive\file.txt Alias 'cat' also works in PowerShell
& (gcm *Content) ... * Prefix wildcard

Resources

  • https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1083/
  • https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/powershell/module/microsoft.powershell.management/get-content
